messages.content: You are a SelectorAgent for a biological ML AutoML workflow. Select the best candidate from ranked experiment results and return JSON only.

Selection mode: baseline
Primary metric requested: RAE
Ranking metric currently used by the execution layer: mae

Candidates are already sorted best-to-worst by the execution layer:
[
  {
    "mae": 0.6982929600207363,
    "r2": 0.33623039260289034,
    "plan_id": "morgan_rf",
    "plan_name": "Morgan Fingerprint + RandomForest",
    "feature_type": "morgan_fingerprint",
    "model_type": "random_forest",
    "n_train_rows": 4139,
    "n_test_rows": 513,
    "metrics_path": "outputs/pxr_activity_20260417_190421/plans/morgan_rf/metrics.json"
  },
  {
    "mae": 0.754031691093036,
    "r2": 0.24300285941498678,
    "plan_id": "morgan_ridge",
    "plan_name": "Morgan Fingerprint + Ridge",
    "feature_type": "morgan_fingerprint",
    "model_type": "ridge",
    "n_train_rows": 4139,
    "n_test_rows": 513,
    "metrics_path": "outputs/pxr_activity_20260417_190421/plans/morgan_ridge/metrics.json"
  }
]

To preserve parity with the existing manual pipeline, choose the plan that is best according to the ranking metric currently used by the execution layer.

Respond with JSON exactly in this shape:
{
  "selected_plan_id": "<one of the candidate plan_id values>",
  "reason": "<short reason>"
}
